headline: Postgraduate Enrollment Falls 22% as Funding and Jobs Shrink
context: Master's and PhD enrollment at public universities declined sharply from 2023 to 2025 amid reduced scholarships.

cards.big: Postgraduate enrollment declined 22% across 20 public universities from 2023 to 2025
cards.sub: MyBrain15 scholarship program ended in 2023 with no full replacement

cards.big: PhD students receive average stipend of RM2,000 monthly below minimum wage level
cards.sub: Financial unsustainability drives students to abandon research for employment

cards.big: Malaysia targets 100 researchers per 10,000 workforce but has only 72 as of 2025
cards.sub: Declining postgraduate enrollment threatens future research capacity

cards.big: China increased doctoral stipends 40% in 2023 producing 8,700 additional PhD completions
cards.sub: Direct financial support is the strongest predictor of postgraduate completion

cards.big: A country that cannot fund its researchers will always import its innovations
Should postgraduate stipends be raised to at least minimum wage as a matter of policy
